en.metadata.name: OpenAI Messages → Chat
en.plugin.description: Convert OpenAI-compatible /v1/messages request/response semantics to upstream /v1/chat/completions
en.config.strictValidation.label: Strict validation
en.config.strictValidation.description: Reject ambiguous Responses/Threads-style fields instead of guessing conversion semantics
en.config.allowShortPathAlias.label: Allow /messages alias

zh-CN.metadata.name: OpenAI Messages → Chat 适配器
zh-CN.plugin.description: 将 OpenAI 兼容的 /v1/messages 请求/响应语义适配到上游 /v1/chat/completions
zh-CN.config.strictValidation.label: 严格校验
zh-CN.config.strictValidation.description: 遇到 Responses/Threads 风格歧义字段时直接拒绝，避免猜测式转换
zh-CN.config.allowShortPathAlias.label: 允许 /messages 别名
zh-CN.config.allowShortPathAlias.description: 同时支持将 /messages 重写到 /v1/chat/completions
